parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, the trail will append the input to the current trails.

parameters.name: alwayscook
parameters.label: Always Cook
parameters.description: Forces the operator to cook every frame.

parameters.name: length
parameters.label: Trail Length
parameters.description: Length of trail expressed in time units.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Resets tail and holds one snapshot.

parameters.name: ageattr
parameters.label: Age Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to outpt an Age attribute.

parameters.name: oldestpointfirst
parameters.label: Oldest Point First
parameters.description: Changes the point order: older points are first instead of last.

parameters.name: fillmissedframes
parameters.label: Fill Missed Frames
parameters.description: Enable frame reconstruction for dropped frames using interpolation.

parameters.name: attrmatch
parameters.label: Match by Attribute
parameters.description: Connect points sharing the same attribute value.

parameters.name: attrname
parameters.label: Attribute Name
parameters.description: Attribute to use when connecting points by attribute.

parameters.name: uintmax
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When connecting trails by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes for the internal sort.

parameters.name: maxls
parameters.label: Max Number of Line Strips
parameters.description: Sets the max number of line strips to be allocated. This number should be bigger than the actual number of line strips (visible in info popup) for all the trail line strips to be created.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: closed
parameters.label: Closed
parameters.description: The last vertex is connected to the first vertex.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
